_note: Illustrative subset of ICD-10 (WHO) diagnosis codes common in UK private practice. The engine validates format by regex and membership against whichever code file is loaded; swap in a licensed full release for production.

codes.I83.9: Varicose veins of lower extremities without ulcer or inflammation
codes.K40.9: Unilateral or unspecified inguinal hernia, without obstruction or gangrene
codes.K57.3: Diverticular disease of large intestine without perforation or abscess
codes.L02.9: Cutaneous abscess, furuncle and carbuncle, unspecified
codes.L98.9: Disorder of skin and subcutaneous tissue, unspecified
codes.M23.2: Derangement of meniscus due to old tear or injury
codes.N92.0: Excessive and frequent menstruation with regular cycle
codes.S52.5: Fracture of lower end of radius
codes.S83.5: Sprain and strain involving cruciate ligament of knee
codes.Z09.8: Follow-up examination after other treatment for other conditions
codes.Z12.1: Special screening examination for neoplasm of intestinal tract
